Environmental Protection.summary: Consistently supports environmental protection legislation and climate action initiatives.
voted_for: H.R. 1 For The People Act including environmental justice provisions (House Roll Call, March 2021)
Build Back Better Act with climate provisions (House Vote, November 2021)
Inflation Reduction Act with climate investments (House Vote, August 2022)

Police Accountability.summary: Advocates for police accountability measures and criminal justice reforms.
voted_for: George Floyd Justice in Policing Act (House Vote, March 2021)
George Floyd Justice in Policing Act reintroduction (House Vote, June 2020)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Supports criminal justice reform legislation and sentencing reforms.
voted_for: First Step Act (House Vote, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Supports progressive taxation and increased taxes on wealthy individuals and corporations.
voted_for: Build Back Better Act with tax increases on high earners (House Vote, November 2021)
voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (House Vote, December 2017)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Supports cannabis decriminalization and legalization efforts.
voted_for: MORE Act to decriminalize cannabis (House Vote, December 2020)
MORE Act reintroduction (House Vote, April 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Strong supporter of reproductive health rights and abortion access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (House Vote, September 2021)
Women's Health Protection Act reintroduction (House Vote, July 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Consistent supporter of LGBTQ+ rights and anti-discrimination legislation.
voted_for: Equality Act (House Vote, February 2021)
Respect for Marriage Act (House Vote, July 2022)

Public School Funding.summary: Supports increased federal funding for public education.
voted_for: American Rescue Plan with education funding (House Vote, March 2021)

Environmental Protection.summary: Opposes most environmental regulations and climate change legislation, supports fossil fuel industry.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate Vote, August 2022)
Resolution to block EPA methane rule (Senate Vote, September 2023)

Police Accountability.summary: Opposes federal police accountability legislation, supports law enforcement without additional oversight.
voted_against: George Floyd Justice in Policing Act procedural vote (Senate Vote, June 2020)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Supported the First Step Act for criminal justice reform.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate Vote, December 2018)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Opposes progressive taxation and supports tax cuts across income levels.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate Vote, December 2017)
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax (Senate Vote, August 2022)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Opposes federal cannabis legalization and decriminalization efforts.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Opposes abortion rights and supports restrictions on reproductive healthcare.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (Senate Vote, January 2018)
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate Vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Opposes most LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality and anti-discrimination protections.

Equality Act procedural vote (Senate Vote, June 2019)
